# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { VercelRequest } from "@vercel/node";

export const config = {
  runtime: "edge",
};

type BodyShape = {
  content?: unknown;
  headers?: Record<string, string | number | boolean | null | undefined>;
  status?: number;
  contentType?: string;
  chunkSize?: number;
  delayMs?: number;
  mode?: "json" | "text";
};

const enc = new TextEncoder();

function normalizeHeaders(
  input?: BodyShape["headers"],
  contentType?: string
): Headers {
  const h = new Headers();

  if (input && typeof input === "object") {
    for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(input)) {
      if (v === undefined || v === null) continue;
      const key = String(k);
      const val =
        typeof v === "string" ? v : typeof v === "boolean" ? String(v) : String(v);
      try {
        h.set(key, val);
      } catch {
        // ignore invalid header names/values
      }
    }
  }

  if (!h.has("content-type")) {
    h.set("content-type", contentType ?? "text/plain; charset=utf-8");
  }

  h.set("cache-control", h.get("cache-control") ?? "no-store");
  return h;
}

function coerceMode(mode?: BodyShape["mode"], contentType?: string): "json" | "text" {
  if (mode === "json" || mode === "text") return mode;
  if (contentType && contentType.toLowerCase().includes("application/json")) return "json";
  return "text";
}

function serializeContent(content: unknown, mode: "json" | "text"): string {
  if (mode === "json") {
    try {
      return JSON.stringify(content ?? null);
    } catch {
      return JSON.stringify({ error: "Failed to serialize content" });
    }
  }
  if (typeof content === "string") return content;
  if (content === undefined) return "";
  if (content === null) return "null";
  try {
    return typeof content === "object" ? JSON.stringify(content) : String(content);
  } catch {
    return String(content);
  }
}

function sleep(ms: number) {
  return new Promise<void>((r) => setTimeout(r, ms));
}

export default async function handler(req: Request | VercelRequest): Promise<Response> {
  const method = (req as Request).method ?? "GET";
  if (method !== "POST") {
    return new Response("Method Not Allowed", { status: 405 });
  }

  let body: BodyShape = {};
  try {
    body = (await (req as Request).json()) as BodyShape;
  } catch {
    body = {};
  }

  const contentType = typeof body.contentType === "string" ? body.contentType : undefined;
  const mode = coerceMode(body.mode, contentType);
  const payload = serializeContent(body.content, mode);

  const chunkSize =
    typeof body.chunkSize === "number" && Number.isFinite(body.chunkSize) && body.chunkSize > 0
      ? Math.floor(body.chunkSize)
      : 1024;

  const delayMs =
    typeof body.delayMs === "number" && Number.isFinite(body.delayMs) && body.delayMs > 0
      ? Math.floor(body.delayMs)
      : 0;

  const status =
    typeof body.status === "number" && Number.isFinite(body.status) ? body.status : 200;

  const headers = normalizeHeaders(body.headers, contentType ?? (mode === "json"
    ? "application/json; charset=utf-8"
    : "text/plain; charset=utf-8"));

  const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        for (let i = 0; i < payload.length; i += chunkSize) {
          const chunk = payload.slice(i, i + chunkSize);
          controller.enqueue(enc.encode(chunk));
          if (delayMs) await sleep(delayMs);
        }
        controller.close();
      } catch (e) {
        controller.error(e);
      }
    },
  });

  const { readable, writable } = new TransformStream<Uint8Array, Uint8Array>();
  stream.pipeTo(writable).catch(() => {});

  return new Response(readable, { status, headers });
}
